DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: Are you talking about Postie Pete's letters?
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: Are you talking about Postie Pete's letters?

DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: Give me it or I'll smash you!
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: Give me it or I'll smash you!

DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: You've got the letter, don't you?
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: You've got the letter, don't you?

DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: Do you have something you shouldn't?
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: Do you have something you shouldn't?

DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: Do you know anyone that might?
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: Do you know anyone that might?

DefaultChoiceDisplayText.SourceString: Wait - I never mentioned a letter!
DefaultChoiceDisplayText.LocalizedString: Wait - I never mentioned a letter!

Message.SourceString: The ghostly sheep is chewing on a letter, you easily take it from its mouth.
Message.LocalizedString: The ghostly sheep is chewing on a letter, you easily take it from its mouth.

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: You find one of the missing letters!
Message.LocalizedString: You find one of the missing letters!

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: You can't prove nothing!
Message.LocalizedString: You can't prove nothing!

Message.SourceString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.
Message.LocalizedString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.

Message.SourceString: You said... err... something about dragons probably? I dunno. Urgh, fine! You win.
Message.LocalizedString: You said... err... something about dragons probably? I dunno. Urgh, fine! You win.

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: When you post the letter, you find a strange leaf that appears to partially fade into the spirit world. It reminds you strongly of one of those spectral doors, perhaps there's one nearby?
Message.LocalizedString: When you post the letter, you find a strange leaf that appears to partially fade into the spirit world. It reminds you strongly of one of those spectral doors, perhaps there's one nearby?

Message.SourceString: On closer inspection this is just a cloud that's afraid of heights.
Message.LocalizedString: On closer inspection this is just a cloud that's afraid of heights.

Message.SourceString: Fantastic! You've got one of the letters. No-body is as skilled at this quest malarkey as you are. If you could do me a favour and post that, you can read the address by examining the letter.
Message.LocalizedString: Fantastic! You've got one of the letters. No-body is as skilled at this quest malarkey as you are. If you could do me a favour and post that, you can read the address by examining the letter.

Message.SourceString: I did a quick look, but only thing I could see was someone shifty heading off to that little ruined house just outside the Fellhollow entrance. Give it a look would you?
Message.LocalizedString: I did a quick look, but only thing I could see was someone shifty heading off to that little ruined house just outside the Fellhollow entrance. Give it a look would you?

Message.SourceString: Don't mind me. I'm just being bone-idle for a bit. Haha! Get it? No, me neither, I hate puns.
Message.LocalizedString: Don't mind me. I'm just being bone-idle for a bit. Haha! Get it? No, me neither, I hate puns.

Message.SourceString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!
Message.LocalizedString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!

Message.SourceString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.
Message.LocalizedString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.

Message.SourceString: Can you track down and deliver those lost letters for me? I saw something weird over by a little ruined house outside this entrance into Fellhollow, maybe start there?
Message.LocalizedString: Can you track down and deliver those lost letters for me? I saw something weird over by a little ruined house outside this entrance into Fellhollow, maybe start there?

Message.SourceString: Great, you've delivered some of those letters. Keep it up and you'll be well a-head of the rest of the delivery department.
Message.LocalizedString: Great, you've delivered some of those letters. Keep it up and you'll be well a-head of the rest of the delivery department.

Message.SourceString: Hey, while you're just being all bone idle here, mind helping me with something?
Message.LocalizedString: Hey, while you're just being all bone idle here, mind helping me with something?

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: I... wait... what? Urgh, grammar is so hard! Urgh, fine! You win!
Message.LocalizedString: I... wait... what? Urgh, grammar is so hard! Urgh, fine! You win!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!
Message.LocalizedString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!

Message.SourceString: Don't mind me. I'm just being bone-idle for a bit. Haha! Get it? No, me neither, I hate puns. What do you want?
Message.LocalizedString: Don't mind me. I'm just being bone-idle for a bit. Haha! Get it? No, me neither, I hate puns. What do you want?

Message.SourceString: I ain't scared of you! Besides, I don't have a hitbar, you can't hurt me!
Message.LocalizedString: I ain't scared of you! Besides, I don't have a hitbar, you can't hurt me!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh, for Pete's sake! What are you, six? Urgh, fine! You win.
Message.LocalizedString: Oh, for Pete's sake! What are you, six? Urgh, fine! You win.

Message.SourceString: When you post the letter, you find a strange leaf that appears to partially fade into the spirit world. It reminds you strongly of one of those spectral doors, perhaps there's one nearby?
Message.LocalizedString: When you post the letter, you find a strange leaf that appears to partially fade into the spirit world. It reminds you strongly of one of those spectral doors, perhaps there's one nearby?

Message.SourceString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!
Message.LocalizedString: Here, take your stupid letter and go away!

Message.SourceString: Oi oi!
Message.LocalizedString: Oi oi!

Message.SourceString: No, you only THINK I have it, and now you should just go away and think about how bad you are at this!
Message.LocalizedString: No, you only THINK I have it, and now you should just go away and think about how bad you are at this!

Message.SourceString: Well don't look at me. You're not my type!
Message.LocalizedString: Well don't look at me. You're not my type!

Message.SourceString: You notice a small patch of ghostly looking fluff, looks almost like un-spun wool. Perhaps you should seek out its former owner.
Message.LocalizedString: You notice a small patch of ghostly looking fluff, looks almost like un-spun wool. Perhaps you should seek out its former owner.

Message.SourceString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.
Message.LocalizedString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.

Message.SourceString: I was just looking through my bag and then --WHOOSH! -- someone nabbed three letters and escaped into Fellhollow.
Message.LocalizedString: I was just looking through my bag and then --WHOOSH! -- someone nabbed three letters and escaped into Fellhollow.

Message.SourceString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.
Message.LocalizedString: Postie Pete suggested that something suspicious was waiting at the ruined house, outside the entrance to Fellhollow.

Message.SourceString: Oi oi!
Message.LocalizedString: Oi oi!

Message.SourceString: Great, knew you were the reliable sort. I've had a slight issue, by which I mean a pretty big issue by R.P.D.T standards... some post has gone missing.
Message.LocalizedString: Great, knew you were the reliable sort. I've had a slight issue, by which I mean a pretty big issue by R.P.D.T standards... some post has gone missing.

Message.SourceString: I haven't got any letters, that's for sure!
Message.LocalizedString: I haven't got any letters, that's for sure!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: Oh, not to worry. When you've got a moment just... head on back and see me.
Message.LocalizedString: Oh, not to worry. When you've got a moment just... head on back and see me.

Message.SourceString: Oh yes you did!
Message.LocalizedString: Oh yes you did!

Message.SourceString: You notice a small patch of ghostly looking fluff, looks almost like un-spun wool. Perhaps you should seek out its former owner.
Message.LocalizedString: You notice a small patch of ghostly looking fluff, looks almost like un-spun wool. Perhaps you should seek out its former owner.

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: Placeholder
Message.LocalizedString: Placeholder

Message.SourceString: Nothing interesting happens.
Message.LocalizedString: Nothing interesting happens.

Message.SourceString: Err... yes you did. Of course you did.
Message.LocalizedString: Err... yes you did. Of course you did.

Message.SourceString: You could ask one of the zombies around here, they might have your letter. Not very talkative though.
Message.LocalizedString: You could ask one of the zombies around here, they might have your letter. Not very talkative though.

Message.SourceString: Not a clue who that is. Sounds like a right twerp though. Sorry, can't help you.
Message.LocalizedString: Not a clue who that is. Sounds like a right twerp though. Sorry, can't help you.

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: On closer inspection this is two penguins in a sheep costume who shoo you away.
Message.LocalizedString: On closer inspection this is two penguins in a sheep costume who shoo you away.

Message.SourceString: On closer inspection this is actually a great big ball of spider web, filled with more spiders than your heart can handle. Best run away, very very fast!
Message.LocalizedString: On closer inspection this is actually a great big ball of spider web, filled with more spiders than your heart can handle. Best run away, very very fast!

Message.SourceString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!
Message.LocalizedString: BaaaaaOOOaaaaa!

Message.SourceString: Thanks for delivering those letters, here's the numb-skull that caused the problem in the first place.
Message.LocalizedString: Thanks for delivering those letters, here's the numb-skull that caused the problem in the first place.

Message.SourceString: Meet Parcel Pete, my far less handsome sibling and a junior employee of the R.P.D.T. Who seems to have gotten it into their incredible dense skull to try and "help"...
Message.LocalizedString: Meet Parcel Pete, my far less handsome sibling and a junior employee of the R.P.D.T. Who seems to have gotten it into their incredible dense skull to try and "help"...

Message.SourceString: Well, go look for something somewhere else!
Message.LocalizedString: Well, go look for something somewhere else!

Message.SourceString: I've got him on report now, filling in his PIP as we speak. In the meantime let me give you this to say thanks. It's a decoration for the moment, but keep an eye on it and I might have some more letters to deliver, in exchange for some choice rewards.
Message.LocalizedString: I've got him on report now, filling in his PIP as we speak. In the meantime let me give you this to say thanks. It's a decoration for the moment, but keep an eye on it and I might have some more letters to deliver, in exchange for some choice rewards.

Message.SourceString: Sorry about messing you around there. I was just trying to help out my brother here, and, well, things got out of hand...
Message.LocalizedString: Sorry about messing you around there. I was just trying to help out my brother here, and, well, things got out of hand...

Message.SourceString: Well, as out of hand as you can get when you don't have hands. No hard feelings, eh?
Message.LocalizedString: Well, as out of hand as you can get when you don't have hands. No hard feelings, eh?

Message.SourceString: I thought my skeleton disguise was pretty good there, don't you think? I bet I had you fooled! Haha!
Message.LocalizedString: I thought my skeleton disguise was pretty good there, don't you think? I bet I had you fooled! Haha!
